title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 452.210 - Court may authorize persons holding money of married person to pay spouse
text:
452.210.  Court may authorize persons holding money of married person to pay spouse. — The court may also, upon the petition of such person, authorize any person holding money or other personal estate to which the spouse is entitled in his or her right to pay and deliver the same to the petitioner, and may authorize him or her to give a discharge for the same, which discharge shall be as valid as if made by the spouse.
(RSMo 1939 § 3379, A.L. 2001 H.B. 537) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2992; 1919 § 7317; 1909 § 8298
